code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  let is_ws = if is_end
    false
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
    when None
      false
    end
  end
  if is_end or is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(evens)
            evens = token
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{token}"
          end
        else
          if string.is_empty(odds)
            odds = token
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{token}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
